title: King Charles to Visit U.S. as Tensions Rise Between Trump and Britain
summary_full: President Trump has fired criticism at America’s longtime ally over the war in Iran, but there are hopes that the royal visit will help shore up relations.
summary_public: President Trump has fired criticism at America’s longtime ally over the war in Iran, but there are hopes that the royal visit will help shore up relations.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Tensions Rise Between Trump and Britain
